title: Pursue Anthropic Agent-SDK bounty: frame Loop A + multi-agent orchestration as creative Anthropic Agent SDK use
source: Official 'AI Engine x Syphonix MoMQ Hack - Technology Prize' pack received 2026-06-21 (Downloads/AI Engine x Syphonix MoMQ Hack - Technology Prize.docx); summarized in memory reference_tech_prize_criteria.
why: The Technology Prize pack lists a separate Anthropic Bounty Track: prize = Anthropic API credits, criterion = 'Best Technology Project with a creative use of Anthropic Agent SDK'. Self-select sponsor tech + source-code verification. Our entire system IS this: the autonomous Loop A research loop plus multi-agent orchestration (PM coordinator, phase5-hypothesizer/devils-advocate/skeptic, risk-officer, quant-phd-advisor, survival-book watchdog, lookahead firewall). The narrative is already built; capture is cheap.
value_rationale: M: a real, capturable lateral with a story we already have, but secondary in $ to the main track and judged on the same submission.
scope: Self-select the Anthropic bounty at submission.
Write a short narrative on the creative Agent-SDK use: regime-driven autonomous Loop A, adversarial review agents, the lookahead firewall, deterministic staging.
Ensure the relevant agent/orchestration code is discoverable in the repo handed to the judge (ties to B0209).
recommendation: Bundle into the B0207 submission; minimal extra effort given the system exists. Skip the NVIDIA bounty (needs Nemotron/Nemoclaw/NVIDIA OSS we don't use).
out_of_scope: NVIDIA RTX 5080 bounty (requires NVIDIA OSS ecosystem; not used).

history.reason: Surfaced from the official Technology Prize pack review (2026-06-21).
